description_long: This is a modern, low-profile wooden cabinet with a sleek, rounded rectangular form and smooth edges. The front features two side doors with subtle vertical handles and two open central shelves, ideal for storing electronics or media. The cabinet sits on short, metallic legs that elevate it slightly above the ground, giving it a contemporary appearance. The wood grain is visible, with a warm brown finish on the front and a lighter beige tone on the top and sides. The back panel has a circular cable management hole, suggesting suitability for use as a TV stand or media console. The overall design is minimalist, with no visible ornamentation or glass panels, emphasizing clean lines and functionality.
description: A modern, rounded wooden cabinet with two doors, open shelves, and metallic legs, finished in warm brown and beige tones. Features a cable hole at the back for media use.
description_view_0: Front view showing two side doors with handles, two open central shelves, and metallic legs.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the cabinet's rounded edge and smooth, uninterrupted beige surface.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a circular cable management hole and the plain back panel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the rounded edge and beige finish seen in view 1.
